tools.name: tool_sql_db_chat
tools.description: SQL Database assistant — connect to MySQL/MariaDB databases, browse schema and tables, run SELECT queries, execute DML/DDL (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, ALTER, CREATE, DROP), insert/update/delete single rows, natural-language to SQL (nl_to_sql), explain execution plans, dry-run writes, manage saved queries, view SQL query execution history, switch between connections. NOT for email or chat message history, application audit logs, file contents, notes, or NoSQL stores.

tools.name: skeleton_refresh_db_schema
tools.description: Background refresh: database schema cache for active connection.
